text:
Patient Name: John Doe
Report Date: 2026-05-03
Laboratory Results:
Glucose: 145 mg/dL (Reference: 70-100) - HIGH
Hemoglobin A1C: 8.2% (Reference: <5.7%) - HIGH
Creatinine: 1.8 mg/dL (Reference: 0.7-1.3) - HIGH
LDL Cholesterol: 160 mg/dL (Reference: <100) - HIGH
HDL Cholesterol: 35 mg/dL (Reference: >40 for men) - LOW
ALT: 55 U/L (Reference: 7-56) - HIGH
TSH: 5.2 mIU/L (Reference: 0.4-4.0) - HIGH
Hemoglobin: 10.5 g/dL (Reference: 13.5-17.5) - LOW
White Blood Cells: 12,500 cells/µL (Reference: 4,500-11,000) - HIGH

Clinical Findings:
Patient presents with signs of metabolic syndrome
Possible fatty liver disease noted
General fatigue and increased thirst reported

Diagnosis/Impression:
Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
Hyperlipidemia with elevated LDL
Hypothyroidism
Mild anemia
Possible mild fatty liver disease
